It was released in North America on October 17, 2008, and in the United Kingdom on January 9, 2009.", "Alice Greczyn | Alice Hannah Meiqui Greczyn (born February 6, 1986) is an American actress and model best known for roles in the films \"The Dukes of Hazzard\", \"Shrooms\", \"House of Fears\" and \"Sex Drive\".
